category_sources: Official lab documentation describes Lab as a GitLab command-line interface utility.
source_facts.description describes a Git wrapper for GitLab.
display_name_sources: Official lab documentation and repository use the Lab display name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site for Lab.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Lab docs describe GitLab repository operations through a CLI.
